prompt: Create a polished anime fantasy illustration of a cheerful young female hero in a Dragon Quest-inspired adventurer outfit, shown in a dynamic low-angle three-quarter pose on a sunlit stone castle wall. She has long flowing soft pastel pink hair with a side braid and wind-swept strands, large sparkling crimson-pink eyes, a gentle confident smile, and a gold circlet headpiece with one blue jewel centered on her forehead. Her outfit has exactly these visible main pieces: one royal blue sleeveless tunic dress with gold trim and a gold winged crest with a red gem on the chest, one white blouse underneath with puffed sleeves, one deep red cape fastened at the collar with a round red gemstone brooch, one brown leather belt with gold buckle, one small brown leather pouch hanging at the waist, one short white ruffled underskirt, two brown leather gauntlets, and two tall brown adventurer boots. She holds exactly one silver sword thrust diagonally toward the viewer in her right hand, with a gold crossguard and red gemstone, and exactly one blue-and-gold shield on her left arm with a matching gold crest and red gem. In the background, include exactly one tall fairytale castle with blue spires on the right, exactly one red medieval banner with a gold emblem on the left, distant green mountains and valley, bright blue sky, fluffy white clouds, sparkling sun rays, and a heroic high-fantasy atmosphere. Use vibrant cel-shaded anime rendering with soft painterly highlights, crisp linework, glossy jewel details, dramatic foreshortening on the sword, wind motion in the hair and cape, and a vertical portrait composition. Keep the image clean, cute, adventurous, highly detailed, and text-free.
